docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, SANTOS AS TO DEFENDANT CABRAL, ABEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
